B-01.evidence: Section 2 (L107-123) + Section 8.1 (L244-276) TypeScript interface 정의 완전: ColumnPersistenceOptions (storageKey, version?, persist?), PersistTarget type ('visibility'|'order'), PersistedData (v, data: {visibility?, order?}), ColumnVisibilityMenuProps<TData>. 모든 props/return/event type strict (C-4: no any).
